title: Cursed Fate: Aurokinesis
description: Adds a new technique to Cursed Fate: Aurokinesis, the manipulation of gold.
body:
Adds a new technique to Cursed Fate: Aurokinesis, the manipulation of gold.

![Icons of the technique](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca1750c4cbc8d170f383c87bb5a3efcd80d9e087.png)

Moves:
Move 1: Golden Touch, 
Changes your right hand to gold for 5 seconds, during this time anyone you hit will be stunned and turned to gold for one second

Move 2: Coin Toss, 
Throw a golden coin, when it hits the ground it turns a small area to gold, if it hits an entity it turns them to gold and stuns them for one second

Move 3: Golden Land, 
Touch the ground and turn a 4x4 area to gold, any entity in this radius will be turned to gold and stunned for 5 seconds

Move 4: Gilded Shield, 
Summon a shield made of gold, granting resistance and apsorption

Move 5: Gold Burst, 
Violently rip the gold off surrounding entities, dealing damage and ending their stun. Chanting increases area and damage

Move 6: Phrygian Palace, 
Domain Expansion. Slows anyone caught in it, and makes them succeptable to gold burst.

Gamerule:
/gamerule midastouchchangeblocks
Stops the technique from transmuting blocks in the world into gold
